title: Titles, Canonicals, Robots Directives, Hreflang, and Structured Metadata · Inference Brief: Title Description
summary: The audit equates metadata with search-engine truth, trusts canonical and hreflang strings, ignores HTTP directives, and reports isolated tags without graph context. Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source.
